# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prebuild
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

variables:
  CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR: "ci/scripts"
  BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR: "build/artifacts"
  TEST_RESULTS_DIR: "test/results"
  PACKAGE_OUTPUT_DIR: "dist"
  ENABLE_CUSTOM_CACHE: "true"
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2

.custom_script_template: &custom_script_template
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.sh || true
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup-environment.sh" ]; then
        source ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/setup-environment.sh
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 1 week
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
      - ${TEST_RESULTS_DIR}/
      - ${PACKAGE_OUTPUT_DIR}/
    reports:
      junit: ${TEST_RESULTS_DIR}/*.xml
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: ${TEST_RESULTS_DIR}/coverage.xml

prebuild:custom_prebuild:
  stage: prebuild
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom prebuild script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/prebuild.sh
      else
        echo "No custom prebuild script found, skipping..."
      fi
  cache:
    key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-prebuild
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
    policy: pull-push
  only:
    variables:
      - $CUSTOM_PREBUILD_ENABLED == "true"
  allow_failure: false

build:custom_build:
  stage: build
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR}
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh
      else
        echo "ERROR: Custom build script not found at ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh"
        exit 1
      fi
  cache:
    key: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-build
    paths:
      - .cache/
      - node_modules/
      - vendor/
      - .gradle/
      - .m2/
    policy: pull
  dependencies:
    - prebuild:custom_prebuild
  needs:
    - job: prebuild:custom_prebuild
      optional: true

build:parallel_build:
  stage: build
  <<: *custom_script_template
  parallel:
    matrix:
      - BUILD_TARGET: ["linux", "windows", "macos"]
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR}/${BUILD_TARGET}
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build-${BUILD_TARGET}.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build script for ${BUILD_TARGET}..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build-${BUILD_TARGET}.sh
      else
        echo "No specific build script for ${BUILD_TARGET}, using default..."
        if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh" ]; then
          export TARGET_PLATFORM=${BUILD_TARGET}
          bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/build.sh
        fi
      fi
  only:
    variables:
      - $PARALLEL_BUILD_ENABLED == "true"
  allow_failure: true

test:unit_tests:
  stage: test
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${TEST_RESULTS_DIR}
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test-unit.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom unit test script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test-unit.sh
      else
        echo "No custom unit test script found, skipping..."
      fi
  coverage: '/TOTAL.*\s+(\d+%)$/'
  dependencies:
    - build:custom_build
  needs:
    - build:custom_build
  only:
    variables:
      - $SKIP_TESTS != "true"

test:integration_tests:
  stage: test
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${TEST_RESULTS_DIR}
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test-integration.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom integration test script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/test-integration.sh
      else
        echo "No custom integration test script found, skipping..."
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build:custom_build
  needs:
    - build:custom_build
  only:
    variables:
      - $RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS == "true"
  allow_failure: true

test:custom_validators:
  stage: test
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/validate.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom validation script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/validate.sh
      else
        echo "No custom validation script found, skipping..."
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build:custom_build
  needs:
    - build:custom_build
  only:
    variables:
      - $CUSTOM_VALIDATION_ENABLED == "true"

package:create_package:
  stage: package
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - mkdir -p ${PACKAGE_OUTPUT_DIR}
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom package script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/package.sh
      else
        echo "No custom package script found, creating default package..."
        tar -czf ${PACKAGE_OUTPUT_DIR}/build-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}.tar.gz ${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build:custom_build
  needs:
    - job: build:custom_build
    - job: test:unit_tests
      optional: true
  only:
    refs:
      - main
      - develop
      - tags
      - /^release\/.*$/

package:docker_build:
  stage: package
  image: docker:latest
  services:
    - docker:dind
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - docker info
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.sh || true
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/docker-build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom Docker build script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/docker-build.sh
      else
        echo "No custom Docker build script found, skipping..."
      fi
  dependencies:
    - build:custom_build
  only:
    variables:
      - $BUILD_DOCKER_IMAGE == "true"

deploy:custom_deploy:
  stage: deploy
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom deploy script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/deploy.sh
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script found, skipping deployment..."
      fi
  environment:
    name: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
    url: https://${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}.example.com
    on_stop: deploy:cleanup
    auto_stop_in: 1 week
  dependencies:
    - package:create_package
  needs:
    - package:create_package
  when: manual
  only:
    refs:
      - main
      - develop
      - /^release\/.*$/

deploy:cleanup:
  stage: deploy
  <<: *custom_script_template
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running custom cleanup script..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/cleanup.sh
      else
        echo "No custom cleanup script found, skipping..."
      fi
  environment:
    name: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
    action: stop
  when: manual
  only:
    refs:
      - main
      - develop
      - /^release\/.*$/

.custom_script_with_tools:
  stage: build
  image: ubuntu:22.04
  tags:
    - shared
  before_script:
    - apt-get update -qq
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/install-dependencies.sh" ]; then
        echo "Installing custom dependencies..."
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/install-dependencies.sh
      fi
    - chmod +x ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/*.sh || true
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/custom-job.sh" ]; then
        bash ${CUSTOM_SCRIPTS_DIR}/custom-job.sh
      fi
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: 1 week
    paths:
      - ${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_DIR}/
